---
title: "Reunificacion Irlanda"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(gridExtra)
```

```{r}
# Cargar mapa de District Electoral Areas 2014
dea_mapa <- st_read(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Irlanda del Norte/geography-dz2021-geojson/DZ2021.geojson"
)


```

```{r}
# Crear mapa agregado por DEA2014
dea_2014 <- dea_mapa %>%
  group_by(DEA2014_cd, DEA2014_nm) %>%
  summarise(
    geometry = st_union(geometry),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dea_label = str_to_title(DEA2014_nm)
  )
```

```{r}
# Cargar Excel único
religion_total <- read_excel(
  "C:/Users/gonza/Documents/Modifis_Irlanda del Norte/Religion_TOTAL.xlsx",
  skip = 4
)

names(religion_total)
```

```{r}
# Renombrar columnas
religion_total <- religion_total %>%
  rename(
    dea_code = `District Electoral Area 2014 Code`,
    dea_label = `District Electoral Area 2014 Label`,
    catholic_2001 = Catholic...3,
    protestant_2001 = Protestant...4,
    other_2001 = Other...5,
    catholic_2011 = Catholic...6,
    protestant_2011 = Protestant...7,
    other_2011 = Other...8,
    catholic_2021 = Catholic...9,
    protestant_2021 = Protestant...10,
    other_2021 = Other...11
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dea_label = str_to_title(dea_label)
  )
```

```{r}
# Pasar a formato largo
religion_long <- religion_total %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = catholic_2001:other_2021,
    names_to = c("religion", "year"),
    names_sep = "_",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = religion,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    catholic = as.numeric(catholic),
    protestant = as.numeric(protestant),
    other = as.numeric(other),
    
    classification = case_when(
      catholic > 0.5 ~ "Mayoría católica",
      protestant > 0.5 ~ "Mayoría protestante",
      catholic > protestant ~ "Pluralidad católica",
      protestant > catholic ~ "Pluralidad protestante",
      TRUE ~ "Tie"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
# Crear mapas por año
map_2001 <- dea_2014 %>%
  left_join(
    religion_long %>% filter(year == "2001"),
    by = "dea_label"
  )

map_2011 <- dea_2014 %>%
  left_join(
    religion_long %>% filter(year == "2011"),
    by = "dea_label"
  )

map_2021 <- dea_2014 %>%
  left_join(
    religion_long %>% filter(year == "2021"),
    by = "dea_label"
  )
```

```{r}
# Comprobar si hay zonas sin unir
map_2021 %>%
  filter(is.na(classification)) %>%
  select(DEA2014_nm, dea_label)
```

```{r}
hacer_mapa <- function(data, titulo) {

  ggplot(data) +
    geom_sf(
      aes(fill = classification),
      color = "white",
      linewidth = 0.01
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Mayoría protestante" = "#D62828",
        "Pluralidad protestante" = "#F4A261",
        "Mayoría católica" = "#08519C",
        "Pluralidad católica" = "#9ECAE1"
      ),
      breaks = c(
        "Mayoría protestante",
        "Pluralidad protestante",
        "Mayoría católica",
        "Pluralidad católica"
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      title = titulo,
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        hjust = 0.5,
        face = "bold",
        size = 13
      ),

      legend.position = "right",

      legend.direction = "vertical",

      legend.text = element_text(size = 7),

      legend.key.height = unit(0.35, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(0.35, "cm")
    )
}
```

```{r}
# Crear mapas
p2001 <- hacer_mapa(map_2001, "2001") +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.05, 0.95),
    legend.justification = c(0, 1),

    legend.background = element_rect(
      fill = "white",
      colour = NA
    ),

    legend.text = element_text(size = 5),

    legend.key.height = unit(0.18, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.18, "cm")
  )

p2011 <- hacer_mapa(map_2011, "2011") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p2021 <- hacer_mapa(map_2021, "2021") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
# Mostrar los tres mapas juntos
grid.arrange(
  p2001,
  p2011,
  p2021,
  ncol = 3,
  top = "Cambios en religión entre 2001 y 2021"
)
```

```{r}
# Contar categorías por año
religion_long %>%
  count(year, classification)
```

```{r}
png(
  "religion_northern_ireland.png",
  width = 3000,
  height = 1200,
  res = 300
)

grid.arrange(
  p2001,
  p2011,
  p2021,
  ncol = 3,
  top = "Cambios en origenes religiosos entre 2001 y 2021"
)

dev.off()
```
